contents_tesim: No coherent sequence of hymns in comparison with other Sinai and Jerusalem Iadgaris; identified on f. 220v: hymns from Uʒv. Iadgari, Sixth Sunday after Pentecost; 9 March; on ff. 241r and 246v: 6 August
